name: gitsmith
description: Stop writing inconsistent commit messages. GitSmith prompts you through your team's commit format so every commit follows the standard and your git history stays clean and trackable.

scripts.lint: node --check bin/cli.js && node --check src/index.js && node --check src/commands/commit.js && node --check src/commands/init.js && node --check src/config/default.js && node --check src/config/loader.js && node --check src/config/schema.js && node --check src/prompt/builder.js && node --check src/format/template.js && node --check src/git/executor.js
